timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Chev Chelios wakes up groggy with impaired vision and motor control, hears a ringing cell phone playing the Pacman theme, falls out of bed, and crawls toward it.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Chev wakes with severe neurological and motor impairment, indicating a critical physiological crisis.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: physiologically compromised
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: cause of impairment unknown
evidence_quotes: CHEV CHELIOS, wakes up in his apartment to a RINGING CELL PHONE, groggy, vision doubled
from his POV we see him examine his hands, which don't feel right, don't want to move right.
He tries to get out of bed, HITS THE GROUND.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: resilient under duress

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Chev, stumbling through the apartment, finds his cell phone by the door, pockets it as it stops ringing, and exits forcefully.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Chev Chelios learns from a video message that Ricky Verona has poisoned him and that he has less than an hour to live.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: survival
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: aware of being poisoned and facing imminent death
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: how to counteract the poison and stay alive
evidence_quotes: VERONA What's shaking, douchebag? Thought I'd give you the heads up. You're dead.
By now you'll be feeling your joints stiffen up... hard to breath...
You got maybe an hour, max, tough guy ... baby ... sexy ...

auxiliary.persona_anchor: driven by survival instinct

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Chev must maintain constant adrenaline to survive; crashing into an escalator and driving upstairs, he risks death if he stops moving, as the Beijing Cocktail blocks adrenal function.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Doc Miles explains that the Beijing Cocktail inhibits adrenal function, requiring Chev to maintain constant adrenaline through continuous movement to stay alive.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Chev must sustain high adrenaline levels by staying in motion to prevent death.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Chev understands he must keep moving to survive, as stopping will cause adrenaline to drop and result in death.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Sustaining life-long adrenaline elevation is physically unsustainable without external intervention or a cure.
evidence_quotes: DOC MILES, speaking partially to himself, explains that the flow of adrenaline is keeping Chev alive.
He explains that Chev has likely been given the Beijing Cocktail—a dangerous drug that targets the adrenal gland and blocks its receptors.
Doc Miles urgently tells him he must keep moving.
if Chev stops moving, the adrenaline will drop, and he will die.

relation_updates: Doc Miles becomes the sole source of life-saving medical guidance
status_updates: Chev is now inside a shopping mall, driving up an escalator in his car
auxiliary.persona_anchor: adapts to extreme physiological constraints

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Chev dials a number, reacts violently, grabs caffeine products and ginseng capsules, fills a bag, and reluctantly takes flowers before leaving.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Chev violently robs a convenience store to collect caffeine and stimulants to keep his heart functioning, then reacts with rage upon hearing Eve's voicemail, revealing his emotional dependence.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: acquire stimulants to stay alive and reconnect with Eve
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: physically fortified with stimulants but emotionally agitated
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: no antidote available; survival dependent on continuous artificial stimulation
evidence_quotes: He goes right to the counter and sticks the place up.
He grabs the man from behind the counter and in one move, yanks him over the counter and SLAMS HIM FACE-DOWN on the floor.
CHEV You move, you die ...
He opens the bag and starts dumping CAFFEINE in: Jolt, Coke, Red Bull, Starbucks Frappuccinos.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: combines emotional volatility with tactical urgency

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 31、EXT ROOFTOP OF CARLITO'S BUILDING, MINUTES LATER
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Chev destroys property while leaving, seen from Carlito's distant POV, which then shifts underwater as Carlito holds his breath, heightening tension and unease.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: confrontation with authority and revelation of mortality
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Chev confronts Carlito underwater and learns the poison has no antidote and was intended for horses, eliminating hope for a cure and exposing Carlito's indifference to his survival.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: obtain antidote or initiate retaliation against Verona
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: abandoned by hierarchy, forced to act independently
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: no cure exists; time is the only enemy left
evidence_quotes: The shit they gave you ... it's the Chinese shit. There is no antidote. I wish there was something I could do.
We give that shit to horses ...
I'm glad to know that my death can be of some use to you.
Are you disrespecting

relation_updates: relationship with Carlito deteriorates due to perceived betrayal
auxiliary.persona_anchor: transforms isolation into vengeful resolve

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Chev kills Alex using his own gun after failing with an empty one, then impersonates him via phone while searching his pockets, leaving Kaylo disgusted with Alex's severed hand.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Chev kills Alex using Alex's own gun after his weapon fails, then takes Alex's phone and impersonates him in a call to Ricky Verona.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: eliminate Alex and gain access to enemy communication
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Alex is dead; Chev has taken his gun and cellphone and initiated contact with Ricky Verona under false pretenses
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Ricky Verona’s response to the call
evidence_quotes: He uses ALEX'S finger to pull the trigger twice and blows him away.

relation_updates: initiates hostile impersonation of Alex toward Ricky
auxiliary.persona_anchor: uses deception and violence to gain advantage

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Verona reveals a medallion passed from his grandfather to his father, then to him, before realizing he disclosed too much and angrily confronts Chev, who keeps the medallion and taunts him.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Chev keeps the medallion and taunts Verona, who reveals its family significance before realizing his emotional exposure; Chev escalates by accusing Verona of killing his brother.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: using emotional leverage to destabilize Verona
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Chev retains the upper hand by provoking Verona, who becomes visibly angry and emotionally exposed
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: truth behind Verona killing his brother
evidence_quotes: .. fuck you, man, shove that thing up your ass.
No thanks, but you know I believe I'll hang onto it... looks like you'll have to come find me after all.
Fucked up that you killed your own brother.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: uses psychological manipulation under pressure

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: CHEV, weakening, forces a resident to administer epinephrine via defibrillator, shocks himself to revive, fires a warning shot, and escapes in an elevator as cops close in.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Chev forcibly obtains epinephrine and uses a defibrillator to shock himself back to functionality.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: maintain physiological function to stay alive
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: temporarily revived but unstable
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: dependence on external stimulants to survive
evidence_quotes: CHEV You've got epinephrine on this cart! I want that shit!
He grabs a DEFIBRILLATOR paddle out of TECH 2's trembling hands and holds it to his chest.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: employs extreme self-intervention to survive

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Chev, injured and hiding his condition, argues with Eve, who leaves angrily; he follows but spots armed men approaching, prompting immediate concern for their safety.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: physical sacrifice and external threat convergence
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Chev deliberately burns his hand on a waffle iron to increase his heart rate, then observes armed men approaching the apartment, confirming an immediate threat.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: survive long enough to protect Eve and escape
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: hand severely burned, heart rate elevated, aware of incoming attackers, and rushing after Eve
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Eve is outside and unaware of danger while attackers are moving into position
evidence_quotes: opens the lid, puts his hand in and presses the thing closed. Sound: a stomach-churning sear and sizzle.
He screams under his breath, stomping on the kitchen floor in agony...
but his heartbeat rockets up again.
He pulls out his pink, smoking hand and jams it under his armpit, hopping up and down.

relation_updates: Eve walks out in anger, breaking trust at critical moment
status_updates: heart rate temporarily stabilized through self-harm
auxiliary.persona_anchor: uses self-harm as a survival tool

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: CHEV overcomes weakness, demands one hour from DOC MILES with vengeful resolve, refusing a peaceful exit for unknown purposes.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Chev rejects a painless death and insists on surviving for one hour to pursue revenge.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: survive for one hour to enact vengeance
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: resolute and vengeful, having rejected passive death
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: how he will survive beyond one hour or confront his attackers
evidence_quotes: CHEV No... no, that's not what I want.
His face goes grim with vengeance as the mean bastard inside him kicks in.
CHEV One hour.
CHEV (CONT'D) I want one hour.

status_updates: shifts from passive acceptance to active resistance
commits to short-term survival for revenge
auxiliary.persona_anchor: chooses revenge over surrender

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 133、EXT THE SKY ABOVE LOS ANGELES, SIMULTANEOUS
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Chev and Verona fall from the helicopter; Chev strangles Verona to death midair, releases his body, and reflects on the peacefulness of the moment.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Chev strangles Verona to death while falling from a helicopter, despite suffering cardiac arrest.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: eliminate Verona
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Verona is dead; Chev is unconscious or near-death and falling from a great height.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Chev's survival is uncertain due to cardiac arrest and uncontrolled fall.
evidence_quotes: The spaces between CHEV'S HEARTBEATS have grown longer and longer ... he's obviously having a massive coronary ...
Then, with a final rush of adrenaline, he grabs VERONA by the neck and pulls him along. The two men FALL FROM THE HELICOPTER.
CHEV continues to strangle VERONA in midair.
CHEV finally lets go ... VERONA'S body drifts away

relation_updates: Verona is dead, ending their adversarial relationship
status_updates: Chev is in full cardiac arrest
Chev is falling from extreme height
auxiliary.persona_anchor: defiant to the point of death

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 136、EXT STREET, IN FRONT OF HIGHRISE, 1 SECOND LATER
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: A homeless man dodges as Erona and Chev crash violently onto a city street, Chev smashing into a newsstand with flying newspapers; after black silence, a heartbeat sound emerges.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Chev survives a high-velocity impact with the street, crashing into a newsstand; a heartbeat sound confirms he is still alive.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Chev is motionless and unconscious after a violent impact, but an audible heartbeat indicates he is still alive.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Chev is unconscious and surrounded by debris from the crash; the extent of his injuries and his capacity to recover are unknown.
evidence_quotes: he SLAMS off the canvas top of a moving convertible car - BAM!
comes down hard, smashing into a NEWS STAND
TRADES and FISH WRAPS rain over CHEV and the surrounding area
OUND: LUB DUB

status_updates: Chev's heart is still beating despite clinical death
auxiliary.persona_anchor: embodies near-indestructible resilience

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Chev Chelios, a freelance hitman, awakens with severe neurological impairment and learns he has been poisoned by Ricky Verona, triggering a desperate fight for survival. As his body deteriorates, he relies on adrenaline, violence, and self-harm to stay alive while shifting from survival to vengeance. Despite cardiac arrest, a fatal fall, and complete physical collapse, Chev kills Verona midair and survives against all odds, his heartbeat persisting at the end.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Eve uses an old answering machine; her outgoing message politely declines sales calls while encouraging messages from genuine callers.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Eve uses an old tape answering machine to screen calls, filtering out sales attempts while inviting messages from people she knows.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: retains control over who can reach her by using a low-tech, selective communication method

auxiliary.persona_anchor: values authenticity and personal agency in communication

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: EVE, a strawberry blonde in her mid-20s, yawns and stretches in a sunlit room, talking on the phone with Chev, who questions her about staying home all day.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Eve shares a casual, affectionate phone call with Chev, reflecting their close and familiar relationship.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: remains at ease in a domestic setting while connecting with Chev

EVE I was sleeping in.
CHEV (O.S.) You were sleeping in, that's great, Eve ... super great ... you all rested now?
VE Yep.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Chev, injured and hiding his condition, argues with Eve, who leaves angrily; he follows but spots armed men approaching, prompting immediate concern for their safety.

Fine. She turns, grabs her purse and walks out the front door in a huff.

Chev I said I'm OK, can we just leave??!!

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Chev admits he lied about being a video game programmer while snorting a drug called NAS-ALL in a restaurant with Eve, who notices his burned hand.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Eve witnesses Chev admit he lied about his job and sees his burned hand, shifting her perception of his reliability.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: views Chev as untrustworthy and increasingly unstable
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: uncertainty about Chev's true identity
evidence_quotes: EVE flinches at the sight of his burned, waffle patterned palm.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: CHEV, in pain, desperately urges EVE to make love, claiming it will save him; she resists, they struggle violently, and she panics as he tears at her clothes amid a gathering crowd.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Chev's escalating physical advances turn violent when he tears at Eve's clothes, leading to a public struggle in which she fights him off in panic.

timeline_nodes.resulting_state: sees Chev as a physical threat and reacts with fear and violence
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: personal safety and survival

EVE (CONT'D) Get off! Are you kidding me?
She SLUGS HIM IN THE MOUTH.
They roll around on the ground, scratching and clawing at one another.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: ext thing you know she's kissing and biting his mouth,

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 107、INT DON KIM'S SHIRT FACTORY, 5TH FLOOR, MOMENTS LATER

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Eve begins as a grounded, analog-minded woman who values genuine connection, serving as a stabilizing presence in Chev's chaotic life. As Chev's secrets and physical deterioration unravel, their relationship cycles through intimacy, betrayal, and violence, culminating in Eve's reluctant but active participation in his survival. Despite being repeatedly abandoned and traumatized, she remains emotionally invested, ultimately becoming a committed partner in his final mission, symbolizing her transformation from bystander to resilient participant in his world.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

relation_updates: exposed as physically vulnerable despite bravado
auxiliary.persona_anchor: physically compromised but still present in hostile environment

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Carlito uses a goon to shield himself from a grenade blast, survives, and flees toward his helicopter; Chev pursues him through the pool area amid gunfire.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Verona crawls away from the firefight, collecting his severed fingers and arming himself with a syringe, showing a desperate attempt to maintain agency despite severe injury.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: survive and possibly retaliate
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: injured and retreating, but still capable of movement and armed with a found weapon
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: ability to survive or act further after losing fingers and toes
evidence_quotes: VERONA crawls along the floor,
gathering up what's left of his fingers...
comes across a SYRINGE and grabs it in his teeth like a PIRATE'S KNIFE.

relation_updates: now physically diminished and isolated from allies
status_updates: in possession of a syringe used as a weapon
auxiliary.persona_anchor: desperate, clinging to agency

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Verona hijacks a helicopter, aiming to kill Chev, who clings to the skids and disarms him. Don Kim observes as his men defeat Carlito's goons, then SWAT raids the area.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Verona injects Chev, kills Carlito, and takes control of the helicopter in an attempt to kill Chev from the air.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Eliminate Chev and seize control of the situation
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Verona is inside the helicopter, armed and directing the pilot, but loses his weapon to Chev who has climbed onto the skids.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Chev remains a threat despite being injected and disarmed, now clinging to the helicopter from the outside.
evidence_quotes: VERONA has come up behind him and JAMMED THE SYRINGE RIGHT TO THE HILT INTO THE BACK OF HIS NECK
VERONA grabs the gun out of CHEV'S hand and points it at CARLITO
VERONA WHO'S THE BITCH NOW?
VERONA shoves CHEV aside and hops into the back seat, pointing his gun at the PILOT'S head

status_updates: gains temporary upper hand over Chev
auxiliary.persona_anchor: ruthless, taking full control through force

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 133、EXT THE SKY ABOVE LOS ANGELES, SIMULTANEOUS
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Chev and Verona fall from the helicopter; Chev strangles Verona to death midair, releases his body, and reflects on the peacefulness of the moment.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Verona is strangled by Chev during a fall from a helicopter and dies midair.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Verona is dead; his body separates from Chev and continues falling.
evidence_quotes: Then, with a final rush of adrenaline, he grabs VERONA by the neck and pulls him along.
The two men FALL FROM THE HELICOPTER.
CHEV continues to strangle VERONA in midair.
VERONA'S eyes bulge in disbelief.

relation_updates: killed by Chev in final confrontation
auxiliary.persona_anchor: final end of the antagonist arc

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Ricky Verona begins as a confident and taunting antagonist who initiates the central conflict by poisoning Chev Chelios and asserting dominance through psychological warfare. As the narrative progresses, his control erodes following the revelation of his brother's death, his own physical maiming, and the loss of key alliances. His descent from composed aggressor to emotionally volatile and physically broken adversary culminates in a final midair confrontation, where he is killed by Chev, ending his threat permanently.
